org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.AnnotationValueVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnnotationValueVisitor<AnnotationSpecImpl.BuilderImpl, String>
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: AnnotationValueVisitor.java 1085 2024-01-05 16:23:28Z tquadrat $") @API(status=INTERNAL, since="0.0.5") public class AnnotationValueVisitor extends SimpleAnnotationValueVisitor14<AnnotationSpecImpl.BuilderImpl, String>
Annotation value visitor adding members to the given builder instance.
